data.content: Implementation review approved. Reviewed branch codex/b47c-overview-watermark at 88fce3f68969355e953e064a7ace4bfe19c0148a against origin/main: four-file scoped diff, no whitespace issues, branch contains the tagged commit, and no invariants are present. Tests cover one-sixth cap, sizing-count behavior, +2 pressure promotion, no-grow after decrease, and per-tab independence. Full local gates and browser metrics passed.
